evidence.description: Mohsen Ruholamini was arrested on 9 July 2009 and held at Kahrizak, where he died following torture

evidence.source_title: Tehran Prosecutor Saeed Mortazavi to Serve Two-Year Prison Term for Protestor's Death
evidence.description: Mortazavi convicted specifically for the illegal detention and death of Mohsen Ruholamini at Kahrizak

editorial_notes: Ruholamini was one of three detainees who died at Kahrizak; the one whose case prompted Supreme Leader to order Kahrizak closed
